case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3200.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,120.00 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY JIM REILLY ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT LOURDES WASHINGTON. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,080.00 U.S. CURRENCY IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATION WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: $3,200.00 U.S. CURRENCY HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 141-018-930 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO H&S 11489. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA WASHINGTON, LOURDES

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3200.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
